summary: Match blog archive (post type) layout to Figma design: 4-column grid with featured first card, correct alternation pattern, vertical dividers, image aspect ratio, Load More button style, and row gap
scope: Blog/post post type ONLY. All CSS selectors scoped to .archive[data-post-type='post']

fileChanges.description: Add blog-specific layout rules at xl breakpoint
fileChanges.details: 1. At xl (1280px+): Override grid to 4 columns for post type. 2. First card spans 2 columns. 3. First card image gets wider aspect ratio (622/333 vs 281/333). 4. Vertical dividers between cards using ::before pseudo-element. 5. Row gap increased to match Figma (~64px). 6. Load More button: white filled instead of outline for blog. 7. Fix alternation pattern from nth-child(even) to nth-child(2n+3).

designDecisions.question: At which breakpoint should the 4-column blog layout activate?
designDecisions.recommendation: xl (1280px) - the Figma design is at 1440px and 4 columns need sufficient width to look right

designDecisions.question: How to handle incomplete last row (9 cards = 3+4+2)?
designDecisions.recommendation: Accept 2 cards in last row as-is. Dynamic content won't always perfectly fill rows.

designDecisions.question: Vertical divider positions rely on 7-card cycle (3+4). Pattern uses nth-child(7n+1) and nth-child(7n+4) for first-in-row detection.
designDecisions.recommendation: Apply dividers only at xl+ where the 4-col layout is active

alternationFix.description: Change text-first card selector from nth-child(even) to nth-child(2n+3)
alternationFix.rationale: Figma shows: card 1 img-first, card 2 img-first, card 3 txt-first, card 4 img-first, card 5 txt-first... Text-first starts at position 3 and repeats every 2

fourColGrid.description: Switch to 4-column grid at xl for blog post type

firstCardSpan.description: First blog card spans 2 columns at xl

largeCardAspect.description: Wider aspect ratio for first (large) blog card image

verticalDividers.description: Thin white vertical dividers between blog cards at xl, skipping first-in-row
verticalDividers.firstInRowDetection: nth-child(7n+1) and nth-child(7n+4) for 3+4 row cycle
verticalDividers.implementation: ::before pseudo-element on non-first-in-row cards, positioned at left edge offset by half the column gap

rowGap.description: Increase row gap for blog grid to match Figma (64px between rows)

loadMoreButton.description: White filled Load More button for blog post type
loadMoreButton.value: background-color: var(--color-white); color: var(--color-charcoal); border-color: var(--color-white)
